word.title: JSON Schema for the concept of Concept Graphs
word.name: JSON Schema for the concept of concept graphs
word.description: This is the JSON Schema for elements of the concept of concept graphs. Every element of this concept must validate against this JSON schema.

conceptGraph.name: concept graph
conceptGraph.title: Concept Graph
conceptGraph.description: the collection of nodes and edges traversed by every class thread emanating from the Concept Header node

cypher.name: cypher
cypher.description: The cypher command that should return the concept graph for this concept
